# Hey, I'm Pawan 👋

I'm a data engineer based in the Netherlands. I've spent 15+ years wrangling data — building pipelines, designing lakehouses, and turning messy sources into something useful.

Lately I've been into knowledge graphs, ontology-driven modelling, and building AI agents that automate the boring parts of data profiling.

## 🛠 Things I work with

`Python` · `Spark` · `Scala` · `SQL` · `Airflow` · `Dagster` · `Airbyte` · `Delta Lake` · `Trino` · `Databricks` · `ArcadeDB` · `Power BI` · `Superset` · `AWS` · `Azure` · `LiteLLM` · `Ollama`

## 💡 A bit more

- 🎓 MSc in Data Science from Liverpool John Moores University
- 🌍 Domains I've worked across: Oil & Gas, ESG, Credit Risk, Telecom, Retail, Finance
- 🔭 Currently at Context Labs, building data platforms and experimenting with LLM-powered tooling
